items.text:
**🎬 CREW & SCHAUSPIELER GESUCHT — Psychological Horror Kurzfilm (Festivalprojekt)  **

Hallo zusammen,  

für meinen ersten eigenen Kurzfilm (ca. 15 Min.) suche ich eine kleine, engagierte Crew sowie Darsteller:innen im Raum Bayern.

Ziel ist ein atmosphärischer Festivalfilm, der mit begrenzten Mitteln hochwertig umgesetzt wird.  

📍 Drehort: Roßlach (Franken, Bayern) — außergewöhnliche Innenlocation  

📅 2–3 kompakte Drehtage (Termin flexibel)  

💰 No/Low Budget (Verpflegung + Fahrtkosten nach Absprache)  

🏆 Festival-Einreichungen 

🎬 Starkes Showreel-Material  

---

🩸 **STORY (kurz)  **

Eine Jugendliche nimmt nachts eine streunende Katze mit nach Hause.  

Am nächsten Morgen ist sie verschwunden — stattdessen befindet sich mitten im Wohnzimmer ein...  

Während Familie und Geistliche versuchen zu begreifen, was geschehen ist, wird klar:  

Etwas wurde nicht begraben — sondern festgehalten.  

Atmosphärischer Horror, stark schauspielgetrieben, Fokus auf Spannung und Bildsprache statt Effekte.

---

**🎥 BESONDERS GESUCHT: KAMERA / DoP ** 

Der Film lebt von Licht, Bewegung und Atmosphäre — keine Effekt-Show.  

• Erfahrung mit Innenraum-Lichtsetzung  

• Gefühl für Spannung statt Jumpscares  

• Eigenes Equipment von Vorteil  

• Interesse an visuell starkem Erzählen  

---

**🎬 WEITERE CREW  **

• Set-Ton  

• Licht / Gaffer  

• Produktionsassistenz  

• Maske (auch Einsteiger willkommen)  

• Motivierte Allrounder  

• Unterstützung in Postproduktion / Organisation willkommen  

---

🎭 SCHAUSPIELER:INNEN  

• Jugendliche Rolle (w / ca. 15–18)  

• Erwachsene Rollen (Mutter 50-55, Pfarrer 30-35, Imam 55-65)  

Intensive, emotional starke Szenen.

---

🧠 **WAS MIR WICHTIG IST  **

✔️ Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist  

✔️ Interesse an einem ernsthaft umgesetzten Indie-Projekt  

✔️ Kreativer Input ausdrücklich erwünscht  

✔️ Gerne auch Menschen, die das Projekt bis zur Festivalphase begleiten möchten  

---

Wenn du Interesse hast, schreib mir gern eine PN mit kurzer Vorstellung

Empfehlungen oder Weiterleitungen sind ebenfalls willkommen 🙏  

#CrewCall #FilmcrewGesucht #Kurzfilm #Horrorfilm  

#DoP #KameraGesucht #SchauspielerGesucht  

#IndieFilm #Festivalfilm #Filmstudenten  

#Bamberg #oberfranken

items.title: KOMPARSE.DE

topComments.text: ...und du bist ein türkischer PKW?

Falls , nicht schon geschehen,  solltest du vernünftige Fotos haben mit denen du dich bei Komparse.de  oder Agenturen bewerben kannst. Diese wollen mindestens 4 Fotos, davon ein Profilfoto, ein Ganzkörperfoto, vor neutralem hellen Hintergrund. Jeweils einmal lächelnd und einmal neutraler Gesichtsausdruck. Mit deinem Facebook Profil  wirst du da kaum, eher null Chancen haben irgendwo gebucht zu werden. 
Man muss schon Aktiv werden, nicht jedem fallen die Komparsen Jobs in den Schoß! 
Auch würde ich bei Gesuchen etwas mehr schreiben,  wie nur, "Hallo ich suche Job" überspitzt ausgedrückt! 
Viel Erfolg bei der Suche! 
Gruß

items.text:
CASTING CALL- LOS ANGELES PLAY

Hey y’all!! My 10 minute play got into a play festival called Script Shuffle 2026 and we’re looking to cast someone in the LA area!! 

All we need is a masculine presenting person (any gender) who looks younger to play Child, a 10 year old version of an adult who child is having a conversation with. 

The play is a conversation between an adult and his child self as they share memories and offer advice about life and growing up!

The mandatory dates are tech on Tuesday the 7th and the performances are April 8th and April 10th!

If you or if you know someone who might be interested, please email joshuamedinaentertainment@gmail.com with your headshot & resume for sides!!

items.text:
**🎬CASTING CALL: “Let’s Talk Medicare” Educational Video Series**

**Production Company:** Playfish Media
**Client:** UCLA Health Medicare Advantage Plan (UHMAP)
**Role:** On Camera Host / Medicare Advocate
**Union Status:** Non-union
**Shoot Duration:** One full-day
**Shoot Dates:** April 1, 2, or 3, (exact date TBD)
**Filming Location:** Seattle, WA
**Usage Term:** 3 years, regional to Los Angeles County

[Playfish Media](http://playfishmedia.com/) is seeking a warm, relatable on camera host for a five part educational video series for UCLA Health Medicare Advantage Plan. Each video will run approximately two minutes and will also be edited into shorter :30 and :15 cutdowns for use across multiple digital platforms.

**PROJECT OVERVIEW**

“Let’s Talk Medicare” is designed to provide clear, accessible guidance on important Medicare topics. The host will speak directly to camera, helping simplify complex information and build trust with viewers seeking straightforward answers about their healthcare options.

**SEEKING**

Female talent, ages 50 to 65. Hispanic, or Hispanic presenting. Talent should appear healthy, warm, trustworthy, and confident, with a natural and conversational delivery style. We are looking for someone who feels like a knowledgeable, relatable guide, like a friend offering helpful advice, without coming across as overly scripted or sales driven.

Strong direct to camera skills are required. Must be comfortable using a teleprompter and able to deliver scripted material clearly in easily understandable English.

**TRAVEL**

Filming will take place in Seattle, WA. Local talent is encouraged to submit, but nationwide casting is open. Travel and accommodations will be provided if needed.

**USAGE**

Content will run for three years, regional to Los Angeles County. Distribution includes digital and online platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Nextdoor, paid social advertising, online video and connected TV, website landing pages, and internal training use.

**DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENT**

Talent must disclose any previous representation, endorsement, or appearance in advertising for Medicare related brands, including but not limited to Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare, or SCAN, at the time of submission.

**RATE**

$1,000 shoot day
$3,750 usage
+ Agency fees (if applicable)

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit a self taped audition using the provided script sample, along with headshot and resume.

**Subject line: **“Let’s Talk Medicare”
**Email:** talent@playfishmedia.com
**Submission deadline:** March 3rd

**SCRIPT SAMPLE**

*“Hi there! If you’re new to Medicare, UCLA Health Medicare*

*Advantage Plan is here to help you get started.*

*It’s important to understand Medicare eligibility requirements.*

*Most people become eligible for Medicare when they turn 65.*

*People under 65, with a qualifying disability, may also be eligible.”*

message.text:
The Spring Ahas Acting Showcase begins February 26th.
Industry presentation: April 16th.

This is not a class performance.
It's a curated talent presentation for invited VIPs as Casting Directors, Talent Agents, and Producers.

Six weeks of focused preparation.
One night.
The right room.

✨ Enroll Today. Limited Slots Available.

#AhasActing #ActorShowcase #IndustryNight
#FilmIndustry #SeriousActors

items.text:
Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

topComments.text:
I bagged a supporting actor role for an independent short film, by an award winning director 👊
I only started doing this 4 months, ago, this is my 5th one 👀
I got a response back about a small role I went for in a TV series I didn’t get it but I was told they would keep me in kind for other things, to me that’s a win 💪🏻

items.title: The Drama Coach

topComments.text: You need to be here. Brilliant group for parents of working children. Start with the featured posts which will give you everything you need to get started with advice on agencies etc. https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1ARMEgQoGv/?mibextid=wwXIfr
I have lots of free tips etc for teen actors on all my The Drama Coach socials (especially TikTok and Instagram)

items.text:
Student drama film (please read caption some changes)
CASTING CALL

We are looking for 2 actors one male (18-23) and a female (30+) to be apart of our student short drama film! We are based in Manchester and would be shooting for 1 day in the week of the 23rd of March. 

For anyone interested or wanting to know more email us at ameliagwheatley@gmail.com / 1256982@metfilmstudents.ac.uk

items.text:
**KORTFILM**

*VI SØGER EN KVINDE OG EN MAND I ALDEREN 19 TIL 25 ÅR TIL OPTAGELSER DEN 11. OG 12. APRIL 2026*

Vi kommer fra Den Danske Ungdomsfilmskole (Station Next Aarhus), hvor vi skal i gang med vores hovedproduktion. Det drejer sig om en komediekortfilm, som optages i foråret 2026.

Filmen handler om en mand, der forsøger at redde sit forhold, efter han har glemt at købe en årsdagsgave til sin kæreste.

Du bedes sende et selftape ud fra instruktionerne under den rolle, du søger. Manuskriptet sendes ved henvendelse.

Selftape behøver ikke være teknisk avanceret. En simpel optagelse på telefon er helt fint.

**Løn:**

Rollerne er ulønnede, men transport og forplejning dækkes.

**Optagelser:**

Optagedagene er planlagt som heldagsproduktioner begge dage.
Optagelserne finder sted i Aarhus og omegn.

**Roller:**

**Lukas:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Lukas er en ynkelig mand, der ofte hopper over, hvor gærdet er lavest, men som vil gøre alt for at redde sit forhold.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 35 samt replik 9 til 14.

**Sofie:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Sofie er realistisk og tror på, at et forhold kræver tid og energi.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 37 og ned til slutningen.

**Deadline:**

Deadline for selftape er 28. februar 2026.
Vi afholder fysisk casting den 7. marts 2026.

**Ansøgning:**

Ansøgningen sendes til Nikoline på
**nfischermikkelsen@gmail.com**

OM ROLLEN: skarp interesseret klog pige, der utroligt voksnes verden. Erfaring er ikke Filmen omhandler kvinde og lille pige magtkamp mellem spejderlejr. ung PRAKTISK Optagelserne derudover stede. forega Aarhus omegn uge sorge gode trygge rammer, altid ansvarlige voksen Rollen ulennet, men kost forplejning selvfolgelig vaere sorget for, samt nogle spaendende sjove optagedage. Ved interesse send gerne dig, hvor fortaeller gerne gerne billeder samt sendes video introduktion máske Derudover vedhaeft relevant erfaring. instruktorassistent Ansogning skal sendes inden 4/3 forventer kunne give pả forste castingrunde 11/3. here fra S8'

items.text:
Rytmigo går digitalt! Derfor tilbyder jeg lønnede jobs til børn der kan synge og/eller danse. Det mangler jeg:

Børn der kan synge mellem 8 - 12 år
Børn der kan danse mellem 9 - 17 år

I den forbindelse afholder jeg audition i Aalborg lørdag d. 10 Januar fra 13 - 16. Udover mig, vil der være en repræsentant fra Lille Label, som er en del af Sony. Lokationen i Aalborg sender jeg i en pm, når vi har aftalt noget endeligt. Mere info gives under audition. 

Så hvis du kender et barn der kunne tænke sig verdens fedeste fritidsjob, så send mig en mail på thomas@rytmigo.dk eller send en pb her på facebook, med lyd eller levende billeder af sang eller dans. Så aftaler vi videre derfra.  

Fremtidig indspilning af sang og video vil foregå fast i Aalborg, hovedsageligt i weekender eller ferier. Kan I ikke det, så er der ingen grund til at sende mig noget, eller melde jer til.  

Mvh
Thomas / Rytmigo

topComments.text: Mon ikke du mener en anden mdr. end Januar? 😊

items.text:
🚨 **MODEL CALL: Food & Beverage Lifestyle COLLAB | MARCH 1ST (Burbank)** 🚨

🕟 Evening Session: 4:30 PM – 5:30 PM

📍 Location: Burbank, CA

We’re casting **male models** for a Food & Beverage lifestyle collaboration happening this Sunday, March 1st.

This is an **unpaid collaboration**, and we want to be clear about that upfront. Our community is centered around intentionally creating opportunities that help talent build strong portfolios, gain on-set experience, and connect with real creatives — including producers and crew already attached to upcoming projects.

Think of this shoot as an **introduction into what’s possible** when you’re working within a creative community that actively supports and develops its talent. 

✨ We are casting two distinct roles (first come, first serve):

1️⃣ **Outdoor Worker Type**

Think high-visibility vest, work boots, carpenter pants or utility-style wear.

Second and third looks should be cozy, comfortable basics (hoodie, knit, simple tee) for indoor lifestyle transitions.

2️⃣ **Biker / Heavy Commuter Type**

Think moto or commuter vibe — leather or denim jacket, helmet or gloves as props.

Additional looks should be relaxed, cozy wear (sweatshirt and a different color basic tee for variation).

If you’re interested and available:

• Comment which type you can realistically come dressed as

• Be ready to complete our application once we message you

• Serious inquiries only — we’re moving quickly

This is first come, first serve.

MUSICIANS REQUIRED FOR SOUTH KOREA

- Instrumental duet (male & female) (ONLY DUET, NOT SOLO)

Piano & violin, or cello or any other classical string instrument

-Piano & Vocal (male & female) (ONLY DUET, NOT SOLO)

• Venue: 5* Jeju Shilla Hotel, Lobby lounge, bar

• Monthly Salary: $1,700 per person

• Contract Duration: June 1, 2026 ~ August 31, 2026 (with possible extension)

• Performances Schedule: 6 Days per Week, 4 sets x 40 min per Day

• Included: Visa, Round Trip Flight Tickets, Accommodation(close to the hotel), 3 Meals per day

Please apply before February 28, by email: raonfilm23@gmail.com

- 4-5 High quality duet format videos, 8-10 photos, CV with personal information and contact details

We are casting for “This Girl – The Cynthia Lennon Story,” an original musical about Cynthia Lennon.

Seeking a female actor, playing age 40–50, to portray Older Cynthia. 

Must physically resemble Cynthia Lennon (hair colour not essential) and be able to act and sing. 

Please prepare a short monologue and a song of your choice. 

Rehearsals start mid-April. Performances at The Capstone Theatre, Liverpool, 29th–30th May 2026.

For more information or to apply, email howl.michael1963@yahoo.co.uk

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

items.text:
Work in Cyprus for Energetic & Creative People!
Become an Animator or Dancer! 

Do you dream of working by the sea, performing under the sun, meeting people from all over the world, and gaining unforgettable experience?

Then this opportunity is for YOU!

We are looking for animators and dancers ready to bring energy, эмоotions, and unforgettable vibes to the season!

✨ What we offer:

• Competitive salary

• Official employment

• Free accommodation & meals

• Training (for animators) + professional rehearsals (for dancers)

• Friendly international team

• Creative atmosphere and daily shows

items.text:
Looking for a videographer in Wrocław this weekend (Sat or Sun).

I'm a music artist visiting Wrocław until Monday. I need a 1-2 hour shoot — short vertical video clips for TikTok and Instagram Reels. Walking shots, poses, vibing to my music at my Airbnb (great pop art interior, moody lighting) + some outdoor street shots around the city.

Just raw footage — I'll handle editing myself.

Budget: 500 PLN for 1-2 hours.

Can become recurring work — I visit Wrocław regularly.

DM me if you're available or know someone who might be!

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzny do roli żandarmerii państowej**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje mężczyzny **w wieku 20 – 30 lat** **bez zarostu w obwodzie klatki 90 – 95 i pasie 85 – 90 o wzroście najlepiej 175 **do roli niemieckiego Schultzpolizei. Postać ta wystąpi w 3 scenach z czego w 2 będzie mieć kilka kwestii po niemiecku. Kostium będzie podobny do tego umieszczonego w załączniku.

** **

 Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – kobieta o blond włosach -  główny archeolog Ahnenerbe**

 

**Szukamy skarnu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Morskie opowieści’’** poszukuje kobiety do roli niemieckiej pani archeolog  w szukaniu historycznych artefaktów. Najlepiej jakby kandydatka miała **od 35 – 40 lat o blond włosach o szczupłej budowie ciała. **Wszystkie kwestie postaci będą mówione po niemiecku dla lepszego efektu filmu oraz kilka po francusku gdyż będzie scena kiedy archeolog tłumaczy stare dokumenty średniowieczne. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. **Na początku 2025** może będziemy realizować ten mini serial  oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej **‘’Ahnenerbe’’** która chce zdobyć słynny artefakt ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 –Waffen SS ( szeregowy – jednostka rozpoznawcza )**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzn** **bez zarostu** w **wieku 20 – 40** lat o wzroście 170 - 180  cm, pas 90/100 i **obwód klatki do 90/105cm**  i do roli żołnierzy szeregowego Waffen SS .Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest  na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach jak na zdjęciach. W projekcie **planujemy 6 odcinków** w tym połowa z nich jest z żołnierzami.

Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
“CASTING CALL”
Please no rude or unnecessary comments if you are not interested simply scroll on. 

MAIN FEMALE ROLE 

For The Ties That Bind a gritty, independent, self-funded Crime Drama Series.

currently in production. The series films every couple of weeks, with flexibility for longer blocks if necessary, to allow time for preparation, rehearsals, and blocking between shoots.

As this is a self-funded production, the role is currently unpaid but seeking funding.

In return, cast members will receive significant screen time, professional showreel footage, and an IMDb credit, as well as experience working alongside a professional crew and actors with credits across ITV, Netflix, and Amazon Prime.

•Locations: County Durham / Darlington / Gateshead / Newcastle

ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS

•Must be able to drive

•North East England based ONLY

•Strong commitment essential 

ROLE DETAILS 

SHANTEL

•Ethnicity: White / Caucasian

•Accent: London / Oxfordshire

.Playing Age: 22–23

•Height: 5’5”–5’8” 

•Build: Slim

•Hair: Long, brown or dark 

•Eyes: Any

•Style: Jeans, combats, shirt, boots 

Character Synopsis:

Shantel is strong-willed, sarcastic, and fiercely family-oriented — the kind of big sister who leads by example. A daring and determined police officer, she thrives on adrenaline and has an instinctive sense for danger. Raised around the job, she works closely with her high-end covert strategist mother, tackling high-stakes criminals and dangerous missions with courage and relentless tenacity.

Having experienced more than most her age — emotionally and physically — she faces adversity head-on. Her world is a constant whirlwind of duty, danger, and unbreakable family loyalty.

AUDITION PROCESS

Self-tape required

Interested? Get in touch!

Contact: Cody Vera WM

Email: cvwmprojects@gmail.com

Thank you to everyone who has applied to our Precarious Nights casting call! We are in the process of making our way through the submissions, we’ll be in touch soon! 

We are still in need of actors for some of the pieces, so if you fit this actor call out, please head to the link below to apply! The deadline for applications is tomorrow Friday 27th! 

https://forms.gle/mm9ecrzt8tnkuA2j9

Rehearsals leading up to the performance will be planned around the directors’ and actors’ availability. Please note, this will be an unpaid opportunity. 

APPLICATIONS CLOSE: FRIDAY FEBRUARY 27th 

DRESS REHEARSAL: SUNDAY MARCH 29th @ 14:00pm 

PERFORMANCE: SUNDAY MARCH 29th @17:00pm at the Drayton Arms Theatre, London 

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
Casting call - please email!
Julie

Lead

Female

18-50

Details & Requirements

Role description

Late 20s to early 40s, a kind mother and artist, feeling the pressures of single-parenthood. Would prefer acting duos (mother and son) for intimate and emotional scenes, but open to all applicants.

Little Luca

Lead

Male

8-14

Details & Requirements

Role description

8-14 (looks 10), an introspective and quiet boy, who navigates growing up in his unique circumstances. All applicants welcome, but those with drama experience are encouraged to apply as this is a minimal dialogue role with emphasis on physical performance.  The applicant must be comfortable playing the son role to the mother. With moments of intimacy, like hugs - we will priotise comfort and safety of individuals. Parents must be available and present on set at all times. UK film laws to be followed in regards to acting laws for minors.

Oliver/Painting Figure

Lead

Male

18-50

Details & Requirements

Role description

Late 20s to early 40s, a distant father, and the man in the painting that Little Luca seeks.

Oliver Luca Boy, 8-14 Julie (Mother) Female, 30s The figure in the painting Travel & Meals provided Male, 30s Send headshot, showreel (if available), and any questions to: dreamsofmapleseeds@gmail.co Shooting in May London-based All roles are unpaid'

I dag lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg sørgede også for, at mine børn holdt sig væk. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød, inden jeg tilbereder det. Det er chokerende, at hun ikke gør det samme. Er det ikke et must?

Opskrift i kommentarerne.

items.text:
Du har et minut til at lave en ny hjemmelavet dessert, som jeg aldrig bliver træt af! 
Jeg har lavet denne kokosdessert i over 15 år nu. Min bedstemor lavede den længe før mig. Den er simpelthen den BEDSTE. I alle disse år har jeg ikke mødt en eneste person, der ikke har elsket den - og jeg bliver aldrig træt af den! 
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig.

items.title: TODAY, AGAIN.

items.text:
A Tale of Two Headshots.

Same person. Same photographer. Different outcome.

In one image:
 – The eyes stare rather than connect
 – The smile feels hesitant
 – The jacket draws attention away from the face

In the other:
 – The eyes engage
 – The smile reaches the eyes
 – The wardrobe supports the subject instead of dominating

The difference isn’t dramatic lighting or expensive equipment.
It’s intention.

A headshot isn’t just a picture of someone.

It’s a message about them.

And if we’re not carefully managing expression and visual weight within the frame, the message becomes confused.

The person in the photograph should always remain the focus. 

Everything else is secondary.

If you’re a photographer who wants to understand what headshots really communicate - beyond technique - I’ve created a free guide that breaks this down in detail.

You can download it here 👇

#HeadshotPhotography
 #PortraitPhotographer
 #PhotographyEducation
 #ActorHeadshots
 #StudioPhotography
 #PhotographyMentor
 #CreativePortrait
 #ProfessionalHeadshots

items.summary:
A Tale of Two Headshots.

Same person. Same photographer. Different outcome.

In one image:
 – The eyes stare rather than connect
 – The smile feels hesitant
 – The jacket draws attention away from the face

In the other:
 – The eyes engage
 – The smile reaches the eyes
 – The wardrobe supports the subject instead of dominating

The difference isn’t dramatic lighting or expensive equipment.
It’s intention.

A headshot isn’t just a picture of someone.

It’s a message about them.

And if we’re not carefully managing expression and visual weight within the frame, the message becomes confused.

The person in the photograph should always remain the focus. 

Everything else is secondary.

If you’re a photographer who wants to understand what headshots really communicate - beyond technique - I’ve created a free guide that breaks this down in detail.

You can download it here 👇

#HeadshotPhotography
 #PortraitPhotographer
 #PhotographyEducation
 #ActorHeadshots
 #StudioPhotography
 #PhotographyMentor
 #CreativePortrait
 #ProfessionalHeadshots
items.title: A Tale of Two Headshots.

items.text:
Casting call - please email!
Julie

Lead

Female

18-50

Details & Requirements

Role description

Late 20s to early 40s, a kind mother and artist, feeling the pressures of single-parenthood. Would prefer acting duos (mother and son) for intimate and emotional scenes, but open to all applicants.

Little Luca

Lead

Male

8-14

Details & Requirements

Role description

8-14 (looks 10), an introspective and quiet boy, who navigates growing up in his unique circumstances. All applicants welcome, but those with drama experience are encouraged to apply as this is a minimal dialogue role with emphasis on physical performance.  The applicant must be comfortable playing the son role to the mother. With moments of intimacy, like hugs - we will priotise comfort and safety of individuals. Parents must be available and present on set at all times. UK film laws to be followed in regards to acting laws for minors.

Oliver/Painting Figure

Lead

Male

18-50

Details & Requirements

Role description

Late 20s to early 40s, a distant father, and the man in the painting that Little Luca seeks.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTINGCALL GCALL UAL Student Film Production DRE RE m DREAMSOF S OF MAPLE SEEDS Little Luca escapes into the world inside his mother's forest painting, where imagination becomes both a shelter and a brave step toward growing up. Oliver Luca Boy, 8-14 Julie (Mother) Female, 30s The figure in the painting Travel & Meals provided Male, 30s Send headshot, showreel (if available), and any questions to: dreamsofmapleseeds@gmail.co Shooting in May London-based All roles are unpaid'

items.text:
Casting This Sunday (28th) – Paid UGC / Reel Content – Baby Brand
Looking for a female actor (ages 26–35) for a paid content shoot this Sunday the 28th.

This is for a baby brand and will be filmed in a UGC / content creator style (natural, conversational, authentic delivery — not commercial or theatrical).

Must be:

 • Comfortable speaking directly to camera

 • Able to deliver lines naturally like a content creator

 • Quick at memorizing scripts

 • Confident filming short-form Reels / TikTok-style content

This is paid content creation work (UGC), + a traditional film production setup.

If you’re available this Sunday the 28th, text 858-753-5927 with:

 • Your name

 • Age

 • Headshot

 • Any relevant UGC / Reel examples

Serious inquiries only.

****FILLED**                                           **FILLED****

🎬 **CASTING CALL – 2 FEMALE BACKGROUND ACTORS**

We are looking for **2 female background actors** (open ethnicity), **age 25–40**, to play **nurses working at an old age home** in a short scene for our feature film project.

This is a background role that helps bring authenticity and realism to the setting.

**Wardrobe:**
If you have your own **scrubs or apron**, that would be great! If not, no worries — we will arrange something suitable.

**Location:** Surrey City Library 

**Date:** Saturday, **28 February 2026**

**Time:** 10:00 AM – 11:30 AM

**Compensation:** Volunteer position
(Crafty/snacks will be provided.)

If interested, please send a brief introduction and recent photo to:
📩 **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

Feel free to share with anyone who might be a good fit!

items.text:
ISO: Background Performers – March 2 – VOLUNTEER

Hi everyone!

We’re looking for background performers for a short film shooting on March 2nd. You’ll be playing club attendees and bystanders in a nightclub scene.

This is a self-funded passion project, and these are volunteer roles. It’s a great opportunity to gain on-set experience, connect with other creatives, and be part of an indie production. Meals and crafty will be provided.

If you’re available and interested, please DM me with your availability and a recent photo. Feel free to share with anyone who might want to join!

Additional information: 

Director: Brandon James Gilbert

Producer(s): Javier Porragas, Jacob Crawford 

DOP: Max Brey 

This is a Union Project, but your BG work will not be applicable to Union status.

items.text:
Hello! CINCY ACTORS!
My name is keira beckley and i am a film student at xavier university. I am currently looking for actors available this saturday and sunday to film a movie for the College Movie Festival. 

We need all the help we can get and we would love to have you! 

What we need 

Bride- Age 18-Late 20’s

Spunky and pretty, has a crashout so not afraid to yell 

Groom- Age 18-Late 20’s 

Hairline slowly going, nice guy, typical man, not afraid to wrestle 

Protest Leader- 18- 30’s 

You gotta be loud and proud and also not afraid to wrestle and get dirty, willing to wear a mask 

Maid of Honor- 18- Late 20’s 

Funny and has multiple boyfriends 

needs to be aggressive so have a little edge

Best man- 18- Late 20’s 

Bro type, funny guy 

Guests and Fellow protestors- ANY AGE

Not afraid to yell or start a riot, we need you to look like wedding guests or the most crazy protesters you’ve ever met! 

This is unpaid but for a college film festival that is awarded, good for extra acting reel potential. 

Please reach out to Keira.Beckley@aol.com  or PM me (preferred) with your reels or headshots, anything you wanna send!! The location will be told on a need to know basis, And feel free to ask for lines to read!!

CASTING CALL: NEWBORN BABIES FOR HOSPITAL COMMERCIAL! 👶
Powerhouse Casting is on the hunt for a brand-new baby to star in an upcoming hospital commercial! We are looking for tiny superstars who can capture those precious early moments.
WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:
Age: 15+ days old to about 1.5 months old.
The Vibe: The younger, the better! We want that true "newborn" look.
IMPORTANT DATES (Must be available for all):
Wardrobe: March 23, 2026
Shoot Dates: March 24 – 25, 2026
Possible Photoshoot Return: March 26, 2026 (for select talent only)
COMPENSATION & RATES:
(Moving Media rates are inclusive of agency fees)
Session Fee: $600.00
Wardrobe Fee: $75.00
Usage (Moving Media): $5,000.00 (2-year term, includes digital stills pulled from video)
Additional Stills (if selected): $2,250.00 + 15% AF (2-year term, includes Print & OOH)
HOW TO APPLY:
Please follow this link for full application instructions:
👉 APPLY HERE - hit this LINK:  https://projectnewborn.castingcrane.com/
Know a new parent with a beautiful newborn? Please TAG them or SHARE this post to help us find our star!
#CastingCall #NewbornCasting #TorontoTalent #PowerhouseCasting #BabyModel #HospitalCommercial

Hello to every mother out there that is in the 18-40 age range! 
Note: This is a Heery Loftus casting opportunity. Martino Casting and Red Arena Films are not associated with the company, but believe there are so many talented/courageous/fantastic momma’s in the #Philadelphia and #tristatearea that we simply had to share this casting call. 
Break ‘em!

sharedPost.text:
HEERY LOFTUS CASTING – SEEKING A REAL MOM with pre-schoolers. We’re looking for a mom  with pre-schoolers who has a "hipster" vibe- not your typical soccer mom. Wild colored hair, Piercings, tattoos ok!  

If that’s you, send us a some pictures of you with your kid(s)
Looking for Non-Union women , age 20-35
Shoot Dates: Feb 27–28 or March 1
Location: Philadelphia area
Rate: $3,600/day (This is a principal role)
Please submit photos by ASAP!  by 2/25/26 @ 4=5PM
Be sure to tell us your name, phone number, age, kids names and ages  and where you are located.

Please submit to: heeryloftuscasting@gmail.com

Please share!

items.text:
[CASTING CALL!]
Hi all! 

Currently searching for 2 actors to be involved in a short university film project.

The synopsis being an enthusiastic real estate agent scouting a home to be put on the market. Meeting the owner he intrudes on her personal business she would rather keep in the past!

Ages between 25 - 40 

The work will be unpaid however travel and food will be accommodated!!

Filming will take place in chester on the 16th - 17th of March (with potential reshoots on the 18th)

Email is provided in the poster to get in touch! Thanks a bunch!

items.text:
Hello all, I’m in need of some voice over artists for a large project happing in March/April.  

Must be from Wales as I need Welsh accents.  Half the project is in Welsh and half in English (Welsh accent).  

Recording will be taking place at my studio in central Liverpool.  If you’re local and free for the above shoot me a message.  The project will take place over multiple sessions so quite a bit of work going if you’re interested!

EDIT:  Welsh natives only, can’t just be doing a Welsh accent im afraid.  The recording will be taking place in Liverpool April time ish over 5 days or so.  Please only get in touch if the above works for you.  Thanks!

topComments.text: Hi James, I’m an Actress from North West Wales who is fluent in the Welsh language. I have a degree in acting and have lived in Liverpool for over 6 years now, I’m highly interested in this opportunity and would love to speak more about it, thank you :)

Hi James. I’m a professional VO and I have some good contacts with experienced pro Welsh VOs but they aren’t based locally. Would you be open to a remote connection with VOs who have broadcast quality home studios and are very experienced with remote sessions? If so I’ll be happy to pass on their details.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING DO NOWEGO PROJEKTU AKTORSKIEGO!

Marzysz o wystąpieniu na scenie, ale do tej pory nie miałxś okazji?
To idealny moment, aby spróbować swoich sił! 
Szukamy osób pełnych zaangażowania, otwartych i chętnych do rozwoju, mieszkających w okolicach Trójmiasta. 
Z nami zdobędziesz nowe doświadczenia, poznasz świetnych ludzi i weźmiesz udział w wyjątkowym projekcie artystycznym, którego efektem będzie spektakl muzyczny. 

Kogo szukamy?
Osób, w wieku 16-25 lat, które mają doświadczenie aktorskie, wokalne lub taneczne. (Będzie to duży atut.)
Jeśli nie masz takiego doświadczenia, a czujesz pasję i chęć rozwoju, lub jesteś w innym wieku – również rozważymy Twoje zgłoszenie! 
Warto próbować ;))

Jak aplikować?
Zgłoszenie wyślij na adres przedostatniprzystanek@gmail.com do 1 stycznia włącznie. 
Mail powinien zawierać:
*  krótki opis Twojej osoby, 
* informację dlaczego chcesz dołączyć,
*  opis twoich dotychczasowych doświadczeń artystycznych (CV, możesz wysłać też selftape),
* aktualne zdjęcie sylwetki oraz portretowe,
* link do twojego facebooka/ messengera;))

Etapy castingu:
Wybrane osoby zaprosimy do drugiego etapu, który odbędzie się 11.01 w Gdańsku. Więcej informacji przyślemy w odpowiedzi na maila zgłoszeniowego (do 4 stycznia włącznie). 

Organizacja prób:
Spotkania projektowe będą odbywać się w czwartki, w godzinach 16-20, w Gdańsku.

## 🎭 **COACHES GESUCHT – Musicalschule Bühnen:Zeit (Rhein-Main)**

Für unsere Musicalschule **Bühnen:Zeit** in **Kriftel (Hessen)** suchen wir aktuell **professionell ausgebildete bzw. tätige Künstler:innen** als Coaches in den Bereichen

🎤 **Gesang**
💃 **Tanz**
🎭 **Schauspiel**

Wir arbeiten mit **Kindern und Jugendlichen im Alter von 4–18 Jahren** in altersgerechten Gruppen und realisieren regelmäßig **Musical- und Bühnenprojekte**.
✨ **Was wir uns wünschen**
* künstlerische Ausbildung oder professionelle Bühnenerfahrung
* Interesse an der **pädagogischen Arbeit mit Kindern & Jugendlichen**
* Zuverlässigkeit, Teamfähigkeit und Freude an kreativer Zusammenarbeit
✨ **Was wir bieten**
* wertschätzende, professionelle Arbeitsatmosphäre
* honorarbasierte Zusammenarbeit
* kreative Projekte und langfristige Perspektiven

📩 **Interesse?**
Dann freuen wir uns über eine kurze Nachricht oder eine Bewerbung mit Vita an
👉 **bewerbung@buehnenzeit.de**

🌐 [www.buehnenzeit.de](http://www.buehnenzeit.de/)

Gerne teilen – vielen Dank ⭐️

items.text:
Raum NRW: Ruhrgebiet, Düsseldorf, Köln und Umgebung

Ich bin angehender Hobbyfotograf aus dem Raum Krefeld/Düsseldorf und suche Menschen, die Lust auf ein lockeres, unkompliziertes Fotoshooting haben. Vorkenntnisse oder Erfahrung sind nicht nötig – wir probieren alles in Ruhe gemeinsam aus, ohne Erwartungen oder Druck.

Den Ort wählen wir zusammen: Park, Wasser, Stadt oder ein Platz, an dem du dich wohlfühlst. Alle Bilder bekommst du in hoher Auflösung, einige bearbeite ich dezent und natürlich.

Ich habe außerdem eine kleine Portfolio-Seite, die sich noch im Aufbau befindet:
[http://jpegwerkstatt.com/](http://jpegwerkstatt.com/)

Wichtig ist mir ausdrücklich: **Modelmaße, Figur oder Aussehen spielen für mich keinerlei Rolle.** Fotografie hat für mich nichts mit Idealbildern zu tun. Besonders Frauen sollen sich ermutigt fühlen, sich zu zeigen, ohne sich zu schämen oder etwas erfüllen zu müssen.

Da ich selbst Anfänger bin, suche ich **ausschließlich Hobby-Models oder Menschen ohne Erfahrung**, die es einfach ausprobieren möchten. **Profi- oder Agentur-Models bitte nicht anfragen.**

Ich bin im Umkreis von etwa 50–60 km um Krefeld/Düsseldorf mobil.

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht.😊

items.text:
Casting-Ausschreibung – Darstellerin gesucht (Filmszene, nicht öffentlich)

Für den Dreh einer Filmszene suchen wir eine Darstellerin (blond) im Alter von 20 bis ca. 35 Jahren.

Wichtig: Nutzung / Veröffentlichung

Die Szene ist ausschließlich für ein Lokal im Ausland bestimmt

Keine Veröffentlichung im Internet, TV oder auf öffentlichen Plattformen 

Dreh-Inhalt

Szene in verschiedenen sexy Kostümen

Professioneller Dreh, klarer Ablauf

Drehorte

Sachsen (1 Szene)

Kempten im Allgäu (1 Szene)

Vergütung

400 € pro Drehtag (jeweils halber Tag)

Anonymität möglich

Auf Wunsch ohne Gesicht drehbar

Alternativ: Gesicht wird nachträglich per KI ersetzt, wenn du anonym bleiben möchtest

Bewerbung

Bitte Bewerbung per PN mit:

2–4 aktuellen Fotos

Alter, Größe, Wohnort

Verfügbarkeit (Sachsen und/oder Kempten)

Hinweis, ob du anonym drehen möchtest

[#Casting](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/casting?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZaM7M86vL0gd4KdTFtWzBJD5VsXE4UZBksLE7Z019-NGF8-jRaNJmmTu23zyJy-A-4BC23LsKpcDNp4MQbCEce5q2pyi31DPijbj5_-7QpD625QEBo5FuYnjQBQsBOprBQX5uGzFHEMULbdbSALVXR2RIiIW76we4A-ck7mYAAAkg&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Modeljob](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/modeljob?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZaM7M86vL0gd4KdTFtWzBJD5VsXE4UZBksLE7Z019-NGF8-jRaNJmmTu23zyJy-A-4BC23LsKpcDNp4MQbCEce5q2pyi31DPijbj5_-7QpD625QEBo5FuYnjQBQsBOprBQX5uGzFHEMULbdbSALVXR2RIiIW76we4A-ck7mYAAAkg&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Filmdreh](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/filmdreh?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZaM7M86vL0gd4KdTFtWzBJD5VsXE4UZBksLE7Z019-NGF8-jRaNJmmTu23zyJy-A-4BC23LsKpcDNp4MQbCEce5q2pyi31DPijbj5_-7QpD625QEBo5FuYnjQBQsBOprBQX5uGzFHEMULbdbSALVXR2RIiIW76we4A-ck7mYAAAkg&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Kempten](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/kempten?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZaM7M86vL0gd4KdTFtWzBJD5VsXE4UZBksLE7Z019-NGF8-jRaNJmmTu23zyJy-A-4BC23LsKpcDNp4MQbCEce5q2pyi31DPijbj5_-7QpD625QEBo5FuYnjQBQsBOprBQX5uGzFHEMULbdbSALVXR2RIiIW76we4A-ck7mYAAAkg&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Sachsen](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/sachsen?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZaM7M86vL0gd4KdTFtWzBJD5VsXE4UZBksLE7Z019-NGF8-jRaNJmmTu23zyJy-A-4BC23LsKpcDNp4MQbCEce5q2pyi31DPijbj5_-7QpD625QEBo5FuYnjQBQsBOprBQX5uGzFHEMULbdbSALVXR2RIiIW76we4A-ck7mYAAAkg&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Gage](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/gage?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZaM7M86vL0gd4KdTFtWzBJD5VsXE4UZBksLE7Z019-NGF8-jRaNJmmTu23zyJy-A-4BC23LsKpcDNp4MQbCEce5q2pyi31DPijbj5_-7QpD625QEBo5FuYnjQBQsBOprBQX5uGzFHEMULbdbSALVXR2RIiIW76we4A-ck7mYAAAkg&__tn__=*NK-R)

items.text:
The Vertical Revolution: How a $30 Billion Format is Reshaping Hollywood's Future

I have witnessed the tectonic shifts of this industry for over four decades. As a working SAG-AFTRA actor for 40 years and a branding and audition specialist coaching talent in Hollywood for the last 18, I’ve had a front-row seat to history. I’ve navigated the rise of cable television, which redefined premium content. I’ve lived through the streaming revolution, which shattered distribution models and turned the industry inside out.

But what I am witnessing right now—this explosion of vertical content—eclipses them both.

This isn’t just a trend. It is a seismic, ground-up restructuring of how audiences consume stories and how careers are built. We are witnessing the birth of a new medium, and I have never—in 40 years—seen an opportunity this vast, this immediate, or this revolutionary. The game has changed again, but this time, the rules haven't just been rewritten; they've been demolished.

Welcome to The Vertical Revolution. We are standing at the precipice of a $30 Billion format that is reshaping Hollywood's future.

Vertical films—once dismissed as a social media novelty—have exploded into a dominant economic force, fundamentally altering how Hollywood creates and distributes content. Netflix is launching a dedicated vertical division. Multiple streaming platforms now exist solely for 9:16 content. The reach of these projects is staggering. When you book a vertical, your face isn't just seen across the United States and its 350 million viewers—these productions are engineered for global domination, specifically targeting China and India, whose combined populations approach 3 billion people.

That means your work can literally reach billions of screens across the planet overnight.

Make no mistake: The major studios are all-in. They are enlisting A-list producers, writers, and talent to develop premium vertical content for this worldwide audience. The question is no longer if this format will take over, but who will be working in it.

I haven't been watching this trend from the sidelines—I’ve been living it. I have personally booked five verticals, and select students of mine have booked upwards of 30 projects combined. We are proof that the opportunities are not just real—they are accessible, and they are happening right now.

If you are not jumping on this bandwagon, you are not just missing a trend—you are missing the single biggest expansion of working opportunities for actors in a generation.

As your branding and marketing coach, I don’t just report on the news—I provide the roadmap to navigate this new landscape and claim your place in it. I will teach you exactly where to find these auditions. I will show you how to directly connect with the producers and casting directors who are greenlighting these projects right now. I will coach you on the nuanced techniques required to audition for verticals—skills that differ radically from traditional TV and film.

And it doesn’t stop at booking the job. I will show you how to leverage your vertical credits on social media for maximum exposure, and how to strategically negotiate your pay, your transportation, and your billing status.

The industry is pivoting to the vertical format. The train is leaving the station.

I am here to ensure you are on it—and that you profit from it.

Let's build your brand for the future of film.

Visit KentKasper.net to get started. The revolution is here. Don't watch it from the outside.

items.summary:
The Vertical Revolution: How a $30 Billion Format is Reshaping Hollywood's Future

I have witnessed the tectonic shifts of this industry for over four decades. As a working SAG-AFTRA actor for 40 years and a branding and audition specialist coaching talent in Hollywood for the last 18, I’ve had a front-row seat to history. I’ve navigated the rise of cable television, which redefined premium content. I’ve lived through the streaming revolution, which shattered distribution models and turned the industry inside out.

But what I am witnessing right now—this explosion of vertical content—eclipses them both.

This isn’t just a trend. It is a seismic, ground-up restructuring of how audiences consume stories and how careers are built. We are witnessing the birth of a new medium, and I have never—in 40 years—seen an opportunity this vast, this immediate, or this revolutionary. The game has changed again, but this time, the rules haven't just been rewritten; they've been demolished.

Welcome to The Vertical Revolution. We are standing at the precipice of a $30 Billion format that is reshaping Hollywood's future.

Vertical films—once dismissed as a social media novelty—have exploded into a dominant economic force, fundamentally altering how Hollywood creates and distributes content. Netflix is launching a dedicated vertical division. Multiple streaming platforms now exist solely for 9:16 content. The reach of these projects is staggering. When you book a vertical, your face isn't just seen across the United States and its 350 million viewers—these productions are engineered for global domination, specifically targeting China and India, whose combined populations approach 3 billion people.

That means your work can literally reach billions of screens across the planet overnight.

Make no mistake: The major studios are all-in. They are enlisting A-list producers, writers, and talent to develop premium vertical content for this worldwide audience. The question is no longer if this format will take over, but who will be working in it.

I haven't been watching this trend from the sidelines—I’ve been living it. I have personally booked five verticals, and select students of mine have booked upwards of 30 projects combined. We are proof that the opportunities are not just real—they are accessible, and they are happening right now.

If you are not jumping on this bandwagon, you are not just missing a trend—you are missing the single biggest expansion of working opportunities for actors in a generation.

As your branding and marketing coach, I don’t just report on the news—I provide the roadmap to navigate this new landscape and claim your place in it. I will teach you exactly where to find these auditions. I will show you how to directly connect with the producers and casting directors who are greenlighting these projects right now. I will coach you on the nuanced techniques required to audition for verticals—skills that differ radically from traditional TV and film.

And it doesn’t stop at booking the job. I will show you how to leverage your vertical credits on social media for maximum exposure, and how to strategically negotiate your pay, your transportation, and your billing status.

The industry is pivoting to the vertical format. The train is leaving the station.

I am here to ensure you are on it—and that you profit from it.

Let's build your brand for the future of film.

Visit KentKasper.net to get started. The revolution is here. Don't watch it from the outside.
items.title: The Vertical Revolution: How a $30 Billion Format is Reshaping Hollywood's Future

items.text:
Hello all! We are a group of CU Denver Student filmmakers shooting a project March 20th-22nd. 

**TITLE:** The Last Supper 

**GENRE:** Psychological Horror 

**LOGLINE:** A young woman's first dinner with her wealthy fiancee's family reveals a disturbing ritual.

**ROLES:**

*Evelyn Hernandez* (20's, Latina, Female): A young Latina woman stepping into her fiancee's world for the first time. Evelyn is confident, strong, kind, intelligent, and deeply in love. Everything a family could possibly ask for...if she fits the mold.

*Andrew O'Neill* (20's, White, Male) Evelyn's charming, pristine fiancee. He knows exactly how to make Evelyn feel safe. Raised in a family that values tradition above all else.

*Nicole O'Neill* (40's-60's, White, Female): The O'Neill family's cold, controlling matriarch. A mother who values tradition, appearances, and 'what's best'.

*Bruce O'Neill *(40s-60s, White, Male): The O'Neill family's smug and detached patriarch.

*Milan Garcia* (20's-40's, Latina, Female): Older Latina woman and maid for the O'Neill family. Doesn't say much, but she is not complacent.

**Director/Writer**: Bella Urrutia 

**Producer**: Christine Galvez 

**Production Type:** Student Film 

**Contact Information**: Please contact by email christinegalve.zfilms@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (8-10 minutes)

**Compensation**: Unpaid

**Union Status:** Non-Union 

**Audition Information**: Auditions via self tape only, reviewing and casting will be finalized early March 

**Shooting Schedule:** March 20th-22nd

**Filming Location**: Denver/Wheat Ridge area, some locations subject to change

**If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link:**

*Audition Form: *https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeiTpaVjnaciNRaruclFMvJFpIAM4pICGlnKLgbNaeYe9wMNw/viewform?usp=header* *

*Sides:*

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/181sc9BycsKa9u3_ixd-H6Zj4Ms7e1VlP?usp=sharing 

**Any further inquiries please feel free to email.**

ATTENTION: 🎬 CASTING CALL: FEARLESS & FABULOUS 🔥

ARE YOU ADVENTUROUS?
ARE YOU A THRILL SEEKER?
Or JUST DOWN FOR TRYING SOMETHING NEW?

Are you a woman who’s ready to trade in the ordinary for the extraordinary?

SixNetics LLC and FWD TV Network are casting bold, confident, and dynamic women for a brand-new reality series that transforms everyday routines — and even full-on “diva” lifestyles — into heart-racing, adrenaline-pumping adventures.

This show is about stepping outside your comfort zone and into the thrill of a lifetime.

💄 Are You…

Living a glamorous, high-maintenance, or routine-driven lifestyle?

Known for your confidence, style, and strong personality?

Ready to swap brunches and beauty appointments for skydives and survival challenges?

Curious to discover how fearless you really are?

💥 On This Show You’ll Experience:

Extreme outdoor adventures

High-intensity physical challenges

Fun, and intense experiences

Adrenaline sports

Personal growth moments that push you beyond your limits

We’re looking for women (21+) with BIG personalities, open minds, and the courage to try something completely new. No prior athletic experience required — just a willingness to embrace the unexpected.

This is more than a reality show — it’s a transformation.

From “diva” to daring. From routine to rush. From comfort to conquer.

📍 Filming location: TBD
📅 Production dates: TBD

To Apply:
Send your name, age, city, recent photos, and social media handles to:

Sixneticsinc@gmail.com with Thrill Seeker in the subject.

Are you ready to prove that glam can be gutsy?

Apply now. 💋🔥

items.text:
While reviewing auditions I constantly see that learning editing is needed BIGTIME! Let's get your tapes looking awesome!

This Saturday's VIRTUAL workshop focuses on helping actors **professionally edit their auditions and reels,** regardless of the device you use.

ALSO, I'm going to share some significant ways **actors can save money** on Actors Access and Casting Networks so you can invest that money in yourself (and your everyday lives).

As always this workshop is only **$37 or free **with your Climbing The Call Sheet membership ($27/month). Registration is easy at www.ClimbingTheCallSheet.com

items.text:
Hi there 👋🏻😃
I’m Freya Tingley, an Australian actress keen to connect with filmmakers who are developing or heading into production on proof-of-concept shorts, features, or series.

I’m particularly interested in collaborating with legitimate, funded projects, or attaching early to strong scripts that are seeking finance.

My work includes Netflix’s Hemlock Grove, playing Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time, working with Clint Eastwood on Jersey Boys, voicing a lead role in Netflix’s DOTA, and leading six feature films including the horror titles The Sonata and Time Addicts (currently streaming on Netflix).

I can work in the US, UK, and Australia, and I’m currently based in Australia.

My showreel is available on IMDb:

imdb.me/freyatingley

If you have a project in mind — I’d love to connect!

Freya

items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM SHOOTING IN HERTFORDSHIRE, w/c 23rd March
Wanted: 1 actor (M, playing age 20-25), for thrilling new short film ‘Scindo’. Shooting in Hertfordshire, over various days w/c 23rd March, a student project from an award-winning Film and TV course.

SYNOPSIS: Ex-student Isaac Turner strives for perfection in his craft of acting. In his pursuit he uses drugs as a form of catharsis, and we explore the pitfalls his addiction creates in his career. We watch as Isaac deals with social isolation and observe the complexity of feeling purposeless. 

Isaac Turner (Male, 20 – 25)

- Description: Early 20’s

Isaac is a passionate actor; he believes it gives his life purpose. Coming from a background of poverty and emotional neglect, he sees no value in himself and uses each role he is cast as to escape his worthlessness and give his life some meaning. He puts his all into each role he takes on, believing that portraying these characters perfectly is his only value to the world. However, when he is pushed to play an isolated and empty man like himself, he must finally confront his own personality and faults.

- Height: 5’8 - 6’2

- Pay Category: national minimum wage, travel expenses and food will also be covered

- Approx. 30-35 hours work

Please contact sheldonkieran4@gmail.com with your showreel and availability if interested!

Thankyou!!

items.text:
Extras wanted! | short film All Included
We are casting Supporting Artists / Featured Extras to play warehouse tenants in a scripted flat-viewing scene. Some roles may include light dialogue.

🎬Project: All Included (Short Film)

All Included is a London-set short film directed by an award-winning LFS graduate director, working with a dedicated professional crew. The film follows Rob as he searches for a place to live, only to find that each viewing becomes an audition disguised as conversation—quiet assessments of his habits, politics, desirability, and how easily he can fit into someone else’s rules. Minimal, dry, and quietly comic, the film explores how a contemporary city can feel reasonable on the surface while steadily shrinking space, privacy, and the right to be inconvenient. The project is being produced with festival submissions in mind.

🎭Role: Tenants in a converted warehouse building, taking part in a naturalistic flat-viewing conversation scene. There are potentially dialogue to be spoken.

Any genders/ethnicity welcomed, age 20-35

📅Date: 2nd, March, 2026

📍Location: London

⌚️Time Blocks (please indicate your availability)

BLOCK1 - 11.30-14.30

BLOCK2 - 19.00-22.00

💰Flat Rate: £20 (snacks & drinks provided)

You will receive screen credit and production stills (great for portfolio-building).

To Apply：

Please email yanyuetaozhi@gmail.com with:

- Full name + phone number

- Recent photo(s)of yourself/ any portfolio or showreel(optional)

- Availability (which time block(s))

Thank you!

items.text:
**CAST & CREW CALL: IN THE NIGHT, I DREAM**

We are seeking London-based creatives to join a black-led short dance film exploring **West African spirituality, diasporic detachment, and self-acceptance**.

This project is rooted in Black cultural and spiritual traditions, and we especially welcome applications from creatives who feel a personal or cultural connection to these themes.

**ROLES WE ARE SEEKING:**

**CAST**
* Dancers (any gender), trained in contemporary dance

**CREW**
* 1st Assistant Director
* Director of Photography
* Sound Editor
* Video Editor
* Costume Designer
* Set Designers

**PAYMENT:**
Unpaid, expenses covered

**SHOOT DATES:**
Filming in London w/c **23rd March 2026**
Post-production completed by **Easter 2026**

**HOW TO APPLY:**
Please send your portfolio or showreel to:
**RJ Ekanem (Producer)** – rj.ekanem@gmail.com

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – No-Budget Comedy Spot (Manga-Style)**

**Arbeitstitel:** „Das Pizza-Finale“
**Drehort:** Köln
**Drehtermin:** 07.03.2026 (Samstag)
**Uhrzeit:** 14 Uhr
**Format:** Werbespot im Manga-/Anime-Stil
**Genre:** Comedy, situative Rivalität

Für einen humorvollen Werbespot suchen wir drei spielfreudige Darsteller:innen aus Köln mit starkem mimischem Ausdruck und sehr gutem Gespür für Timing.

Die Szene lebt von intensiven Blicken, inneren Monologen (V.O.) und überzeichneter „Battle“-Dramatik im Manga-Stil. Gesucht werden Persönlichkeiten, die Alltagssituationen mit epischer Ernsthaftigkeit spielen können.

**Logline:**

Ein harmloses Pizzaessen eskaliert komödiantisch zu einem stillen Wettkampf um das letzte Stück.

**🍕 JOHAN**

**Spielalter:** 20–35
**Typ:** Ehrgeiziger, leicht überambitionierter Typ mit Comedy-Talent
**Aussehen:** Blond, schlank, leicht nerdiger Look, kurze Haare, europäischer Typ. Gern Brillenträger.

**Charakter:**
Johan nimmt harmlose Situationen viel zu ernst. In seinem Kopf wird das letzte Pizzastück zum epischen Endkampf. Er ist analytisch, kompetitiv – aber auf sympathische, leicht überdrehte Weise.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Mimik (intensive Close-ups), gutes Timing für Voice-Over-Texte, körperliche Comedy (Speed-Eating, Blickduell).

**🍕 MARIO**

**Spielalter:** 30–45
**Typ:** Selbstbewusster, ruhiger Gegenspieler mit natürlicher Autorität
**Aussehen:** Kräftige oder leicht muskulöse Statur, schwarze Haare, asiatischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Mario ist der gelassene Stratege. Er sagt wenig, kommentiert aber innerlich alles im Voice-Over. Sein Humor ist trocken, sein Blick maximal ernst – zumindest in seiner eigenen Vorstellung.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Präsenz, subtile Komik, intensiver Blickkontakt. Fähigkeit, Überdramatisierung mit absoluter Ernsthaftigkeit zu spielen.

**🍕 KERSTIN**

**Spielalter:** 25–40
**Typ:** Smart, ruhig, fashion-bewusst – mit starkem Comedy-Instinkt
**Aussehen:** Schlank, eher klein, stilvoller Look, braune Haare; europäischer oder südamerikanischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Während die beiden Männer sich in ihrem inneren Endkampf verlieren, beobachtet Kerstin alles entspannt – nur um im perfekten Moment das letzte Stück zu nehmen. Sie ist die stille Siegerin.

**Anforderung:**
Natürliches Spiel, feines Timing, selbstbewusste Ausstrahlung. Der Humor entsteht aus ihrer Gelassenheit.

Einen Eindruck unserer bisherigen Arbeiten findet Ihr unter:
https://www.visuzfilms.com/

Das Projekt wird ohne Budget umgesetzt. Eine Vergütung sowie die Übernahme von Fahrt- oder Unterkunftskosten sind daher leider nicht möglich.

Wir bieten jedoch ein engagiertes Team, kreative Zusammenarbeit und hochwertiges Material für das eigene Showreel.

Für Verpflegung am Set ist selbstverständlich gesorgt – inklusive Pizza 🍕

 

**📩 Bewerbung & Kontakt**

Bitte sendet eure Bewerbung mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Showreel (falls vorhanden)
* Instagram / facebook (falls vorhanden)

an:
**E-Mail: visuzfilms@gmail.com**
Betreff: *Casting „Das Pizza-Finale“ – Rollenname*

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!
items.previewDescription: Gehenna kurzfilm (Pilot) Uniklinik Köln Nah am Feuer ( Shortfilm ) (Kopie) Sprint Pizzeria RedBull Goldman Enterainment Club Einundfünfzig After Effects Showreel Ich bin Elviso, einem in Köln ansässiger Regisseur. Mein Schwerpunkt liegt auf kommerziellen Projekten, bei denen ich stets eine klare...

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
# CASTING CALL FOR A SFU student film

non-union. unpaid.

**Project Synopsis**

The film is eerie and has supernatural elements. ALEX experiences visions of an eerie field with a nearing FIGURE while going about their day. We follow as this other world steep into theirs. 

~ ACTING EXPERIENCE IS NOT REQUIRED.

The two characters only share ~2 scenes together.

ALEX: (18-25yo) A little neurotic. An overthinker. The visions are affecting the quality of life as they keep losing time. Lives alone and works contract financial jobs from home. Very little dialogue. There is one scene where ALEX changes from work clothes to pajamas. Discussion will happen before set and everything will be adjusted to your comfort level!

FIGURE: (ageless) must be comfortable wearing some type of mask or face covering. A pivotal point in the story. We will never see a face clearly. Non-speaking but a sinister presence. 

SHOOT DAY: March 7th and 8th

7th: outside (with easy access to house), later night. Langley. If there is any concerns regarding transportation we can arrange help for you!

8th: Burnaby area, day.

Please email your headshot, availability to have meeting & demo reel (if you have one) to mgjohnson.film@gmail.com

items.text:
Szukamy młodych aktorów do spotu społecznego! ✌

**1 dzień zdjęciowy w Łodzi**, szczegóły na grafice. 👇

Zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń tylko mailowo na adres podany w ogłoszeniu: moviekuna@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'KUNAMOVIE.PL STUDIO STUDIOFILMOWE FI FILMOWE CASTING Poszukujemy młodych aktorów do spotu społecznego! 1 DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY w ŁODZI w TERMINIE 12 MARCA! SZUKAMY chłopiec w wieku 13 lat (potrafiący grać w koszykówkę) ZGŁOSZENIA Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: dziewczynko w wieku 14-15 lat -wyraźne zdjęcia (sylwetki oraz twarzy) dziewczynka w wieku 11-12 lat -wideo wizytówkę! ZGŁOSZENIA PROSIMY WYSYŁAĆ TYLKO NA ADRES MAILOWY MOVIEKUNA@GMAIL.COM CZEKAMY NA WASZE ZGŁOSZENIA DO 03.03.2026'

items.text:
❤ Uwaga! Poszukiwani Aktorzy do Teledysku!

Co? Jak? Kogo? Kiedy? ...Wszystko Poniżej :)

1. Mężczyzna, rola główna, rutynowe, smutne życie zakończone tańcem, radością i powrotem marzeń, wiek 30+, mile widziany tancerz lub improwizowany tancerz (potrafiący, chcący).
2. Kobieta, rola recepcjonistki, wiek 18+
3. Kobieta, rola spełnionej, szczęśliwej duszy, wiek 18+, mile widziana tancerka lub improwizowana tancerka (potrafiąca, chcąca)

Termin : Marzec 2026 (jeszcze do ustalenia, raczej niedziela)
Miejsce nagrań i czas : Warszawa, około 5h

Zgłoszenia tylko przez wiadomość na FB :)

Zlecenie oczywiście płatne! ❤

items.text: 🚨 ALARM MUZYCZNY! TO OSTATNIE 72 GODZINY! 🚨🕒

sharedPost.text:
🚨 ALARM MUZYCZNY! TO OSTATNIE 72 GODZINY! 🚨🕒

Zegar tyka nieubłaganie! Do końca przyjmowania zgłoszeń w Ogólnopolskim Konkursie Piosenki On-Line „Dźwięki Miłości 2026” pozostały już tylko 3 DNI! 🔥🎶

Czy Twoje nagranie czeka już na dysku? A może wciąż zastanawiasz się, czy Twój głos jest „wystarczająco dobry”? Podpowiadamy: TAK, JEST! 🌟🎙️ W naszym konkursie szukamy prawdy, emocji i Twojej unikalnej wrażliwości. Nie musisz mieć profesjonalnego studia – wystarczy Twój talent i pasja! ❤️🎹

Dlaczego nie warto zwlekać do 1 marca?
✨ Oszczędzisz sobie stresu związanego z wysyłką w ostatniej chwili.
✨ Masz czas, by na spokojnie sprawdzić, czy link do Twojego wideo działa poprawnie.
✨ Twoja muzyczna przygoda może zacząć się właśnie w tej sekundzie! 🚀🏆

Nie pozwól, by ta szansa przeszła Ci obok nosa. Wejdź na naszą stronę, wypełnij formularz i daj się poznać! 🎸🎤

📝 Zapisz się tutaj: https://magiczne-melodie.pl/dzwieki-milosci-zapisz-sie/
📜 Regulamin: https://magiczne-melodie.pl/dzwieki-milosci-regulamin/

Kto planuje wysłać zgłoszenie jeszcze dzisiaj? Dajcie znać w komentarzach „🔥”, żebyśmy wiedzieli, na kogo czekać! 👇✨

#DźwiękiMiłości2026 #KonkursPiosenki #Ostatnie3Dni #Śpiewamy #Wokalista #Pasja #Muzyka #KonkursWokalny #Talent #TwójGłos

items.text:
**KATOWICE I** **OKOLICE **

**Do ról z tekstem szukam:**

**Różycka (64) - **matka Popławskiej, przejęta o los swojej córki wnuczek, bardzo źle znosi informacje o śmierci córki.

**nagranie 9.03**

**stawka 500 zł , 1 scena**

**Roman Mucha (42) **– lokalny, osiedlowy postrach i pieniacz. Wiecznie szuka zadymy. Lubi adrenalinę, alkohol i łatwe (także płatne) kobiety. Wysportowany.

**nagranie 11 i 13.03**

**stawka 800 zł za dzień**

**Właściciel (49) **– właściciel szemranego pubu. Za garść srebrników sprzedałby własną matkę. Nie chce mieć kłopotów, dlatego współpracuje z policją.

** **

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenie **( imię, nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, aktualne zdjęcie, demo lub link do nagrania )** na email **dobrava.op@gmail.com**

W tytule proszę wpisać nazwę postaci.

**Nie ma zwrotów kosztów podróży i hotelu.**

items.text:
Schauspieler / Darsteller für Produktplatzierung gesucht 🎬
Hallo zusammen,

ich suche Männer oder Frauen (bevorzugt 35–45+) für eine Produktplatzierung im Bereich Gesundheit & Wohlbefinden.

Es geht um ein Produkt zur Anwendung bei Nacken- und Rückenschmerzen sowie allgemeinen Beschwerden im Oberkörper.

 • Natürlich, ruhig, alltagstauglich

 •     Kein Studio, Authentizität steht im Vordergrund.

 • Nutzung des Materials für    Werbeanzeigen (Social Media Ads)

 • Kameraerfahrung von Vorteil, aber kein Muss

 • Standort egal 🌍

Bei Interesse bitte Privatnachricht mit kurzen Infos zu dir (gerne mit Referenzen).

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin (w, 20–30) für Straßenumfragen in München gesucht 🎬
Für ein innovatives Produkt im Straßenbau suchen wir eine attraktive, Schauspielerin (20–30 Jahre) aus München und Umgebung, die extrovertiert ist und aktiv auf Menschen zugehen kann.

📍 Aufgabe:

Du führst für unser Produkt Straßenumfragen durch und sprichst dabei gezielt Passanten an.

👉 Offene, kommunikative Art ist absolut entscheidend!

🕒 Dauer: 1 Tag

💰 Budget: 500 €

✅ Anforderungen:

 • Schauspielerfahrung oder starke Kamera-Präsenz

 • Sehr kontaktfreudig & selbstbewusst

 • Keine Scheu, fremde Menschen auf der Straße anzusprechen

 • Zuverlässig & professionell

📩 Bewerbung:

Bitte sende ein kurzes Referenz- oder Vorstellungsvideo

und schreibe mir direkt per WhatsApp: 015771082825

items.text:
Hallo zusammen, ☺️

wir sind Real Studio – ein Content- & Produktionsstudio für authentische Social-Media-Inhalte. Wir unterstützen Marken dabei, echten und nahbaren Content umzusetzen.

Für ein aktuelles Projekt suchen wir Mama- und Papa-Creator, die gemeinsam mit ihrem Kind Content erstellen möchten. Wichtig: Das Gesicht des Kindes muss dabei nicht gezeigt werden.

Wenn ihr Interesse habt oder mehr erfahren möchtet, schreibt mir gerne eine Nachricht. Wir freuen uns auf euch! ✨

items.text:
SERIAL DOKUMENTALNY TRUE CRIME

WARSZAWA i okolice

28.02 / 1.03

140-170zł 

Do nowego serialu dokumentalnego w formule true crime poszukuję statystów wg poniższej rozpiski.

28.02/1.03 - kontynuacja, 170zł/dzień
* KLAUDEK - mężczyzna, max 175cm wzrostu, SZATYN/ciemne blond włosy, noszący okulary (mile widziane, nie konieczne)

28.02 - stawka 140zł
* PACIOR - mężczyzna, wysoki, łysy, wiek 30+

Zgłoszenia wysyłajcie na adres: patrycja@podtytulem.pl

W tytule: nazwa postaci

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość oraz ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + ZDJĘCIE DŁONI (dłonie zadbane, paznokcie naturalne!).

Zgłoszenia bez zdjęcia dłoni nie będą brane pod uwagę.

items.text:
🎬 Missed Our Last Webinar? Join This Week’s Free Virtual Production, VFX & AI Session

If you didn’t get a chance to attend our previous webinar, this is your opportunity to jump in.

You’re invited to a free live webinar on February 12, hosted by IDigital Creative Studio and the Academy of Volumetric Production.

Sign up Now! https://forms.gle/9CGiZbwWRgcoQKGG8  

We’ll dive into how Virtual Production, VFX, AI, and real-time workflows are reshaping the way films are conceived, produced, and delivered today, across both independent and studio productions.

✨ We’ll also share an exclusive case study from Train Dreams, a feature film with 4 Academy Award® nominations, including Best Picture, offering a behind-the-scenes look at its Virtual Production workflow.

Free Webinar | Virtual Production, VFX & AI for Everyone

📅 February 12

⏰ Two sessions: 9:00 AM PT | 4:00 PM PT

🎥 Live · Free · Online

Save your spot! https://forms.gle/9CGiZbwWRgcoQKGG8  

We’d love to see you there and connect live.

The Academy of Volumetric Production Team

Where Innovation Meets Entertainment

items.text: My friends and I are shooting a short film at Stone Circle Theater in Ridgewood, Queens on Monday, 2/16, Presidents’ Day. We are looking for extras to play wedding guests. sharedPost.text:
El mundo puede no creer en ti.
La Vieja Era puede burlarse.

El Anillo de Validación puede ignorarte.

Pero la realidad es brutal: la historia no la escriben los que opinan.

La escriben los que sostienen.

Y el Caminante BC lo sabe.

No se detiene a discutir con el ruido.

Camina.

Porque confía en algo que la era exponencial ha perdido: la intuición como brújula

y la práctica como prueba.

√π: raíz primero, círculo después.

BC: presencia primero, expansión después.

Siempre: camino.

Si no entiendes nada te dejo el link 🔗 

https://dexx-preventa-ebook.netlify.app/

Si quieres ser un BC únete a DEXX.

items.text:
**Castingaufruf für studentischen Kurzfilm (Tübinale)**

Meine studentische Filmgruppe sucht Darsteller*innen für einen ca. 6-minütigen Kurzfilm, der im Rahmen der Tübinale entsteht. Gedreht wird in der Fildergegend nahe Stuttgart. Der genaue Drehzeitraum wird noch bekannt gegeben.

**Logline:**
Als eine junge Frau beginnt, ihre Beziehung mit einem anderen Paar zu vergleichen, verliert sie den Blick für die Liebe, die direkt vor ihr steht.

**Gesuchte Rollen (alle ca. 19–25 Jahre):**

**Weibliche Hauptrolle**
Junge Frau in ihrer ersten ernsthaften Beziehung. Unsicher, emotional offen, stark von äußeren Erwartungen und Vergleichen beeinflusst. Die Rolle erfordert ein sensibles Spiel innerer Konflikte und leiser emotionaler Veränderungen.

**Männliche Hauptrolle**
Ihr Freund. Bodenständig, ruhig und bemüht. Er liebt ehrlich, gerät aber zunehmend unter Druck, weil er den Erwartungen seiner Partnerin nicht gerecht werden kann. Subtiles, zurückgenommenes Spiel ist wichtig.

**Weibliche Nebenrolle**
Junge Frau mit perfekter Außenwirkung. Kontrolliert und diszipliniert, privat jedoch angespannt. Die Rolle lebt vom Kontrast zwischen äußerer Kontrolle und innerer Unsicherheit.

**Männliche Nebenrolle**
Charismatisch, dominant, stark auf Außenwirkung bedacht. Kontrollierend und schnell reizbar. Muss zwischen Charme und unterschwelliger Bedrohlichkeit wechseln können.

Schauspielerfahrung ist willkommen, aber keine Voraussetzung. Wichtig sind Verlässlichkeit, Lust auf Spielen und Interesse an einem emotionalen, beziehungszentrierten Stoff.
Bei Interesse einfach eine Nachricht schreiben, dann schicken wir weitere Infos und das Drehbuch.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'VibeTribe STUDIOS Short-Fim CASTING CALL Drehzeitraum: 14.-15. 14. Februar genauere genauereInfosnach Infos nach Casting Casting Call: 2 Männer (19-25) 2 Frauen (19-25) für einen Kurzfilm die Tübinale (Schauspielerfahrung: nicht unbedingt) Umgebung: Fildergegend (nähe Stuttgart) für Schickt uns gerne Fotos von euch ohne Vergütung, aber mit Verpflegung Drehbuch Drehbuchnac nach Kontaktaufnahme bjoernalisminfoagmail.com Für mehr Information schreibt uns entweder über die angegebene Email oder schreibt uns eine DM per Insta ajasminninette'

items.text:
🎬 SUCHE Ü50 MANN ALS DOKTOR FÜR MUSIKVIDEO (BERLIN) 🎬
Für einen Musikvideodreh in Berlin suche ich einen aufgeschlossenen Mann Ü50, der die Rolle eines Doktors übernimmt.
📅 Datum: 25.01.2026
⏱ Dauer: ca. 4–5 Stunden
📍 Ort: Berlin
🩺 Zur Rolle / Story:
Die Storyline des Musikvideos dreht sich um eine große Schönheits-OP der Künstlerin.
Der gesuchte Mann spielt den Doktor, gemeinsam mit einer bekannten Influencerin, die die Krankenschwester verkörpert.
🎶 Projekt:
– Musikvideo
– zusätzlicher Content für TikTok & Social Media
🌈 WICHTIG:
Die Künstlerin ist trans.
Daher ist es unbedingt notwendig, dass du weltoffen, respektvoll bist und kein Problem mit queeren Menschen hast.
💸 Budget:
Leider kein Honorar möglich.
Dafür:
– Credits
– Verpflegung
– ein kreatives, positives Set
– Reichweite durch Social Media Content
👤 Voraussetzungen:
– Ü50
– offen, sympathisch, zuverlässig
– keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig
📩 Interesse?
Dann melde dich direkt hier per Nachricht
oder auf Instagram:
👉 https://www.instagram.com/echtjetztkimberly
Freue mich sehr über Nachrichten & Weiterempfehlungen 💖✨

items.text:
NYE STATISTROLLER TIL OPTAGELSER I JYLLAND PÅ TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER (DR)

Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (til DR) søges personer i Jylland alder 20-50 år til statistroller med optagelse i Jylland, men med kostume/sminke dag i Skovlunde på Sjælland d. 3/3, 4/3 eller 5/3 et tidsrum ml. 10-16.

Produktionen dækker transport på en af disse måder:
1. Bro og benzin fra bopæl i Jylland til Skovlunde og retur. Alternativt en lavpris færgeovergang t/r tilsvarende prisen for broafgift.
2. En lavpris bus- eller togbillet. Der kører offentlige bus fra Skovlunde st. til adressen i Mileparken.

Derudover er der et personligt honorar for kostume/sminkedagen samt et tilpasset antal optagedage. Se nedenfor

Følgende statistroller er ledige:
Funktionærer og hustruer 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdagene
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland

Der er til hver 1600 kr. honorar for 2 optagedage og 800 kr. honorar for 1 sminke/kostumedag.

Der er mulighed for gratis anvist parkering i Skovlunde til kostume/sminkeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport dækkes ikke på optagelsesdage.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 185, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, hårlængde min. 5 cm så der kan laves sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg, du skal kunne se uden briller.

KVINDER:

max højde 175, str. XS-L, korthåret, min. hårlængde til skulder, naturlig hårfarve, ingen striber med mindre det er gråt hår, ingen synlige tatoveringer med korte ærme og kjole med udskæring på, ingen synlige piercinger, ingen synlig falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen tatoveret eyeliner eller øjenbryn, du skal kunne have selskabssko på, du skal kunne se uden briller.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.

Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

Oplys, hvilken mulighed du har for at komme over til kostume/sminkeprøven og forventet pris.
